top_candidate_question: What trials have Name of ICI = 'Durvalumab, Tremelimumab'?
top_candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Durvalumab, Tremelimumab';
